what_it_does: This file is a ledger-style metadata manifest for a design-assets image named Video_Gold; it records the asset id, address, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, provenance, version history, alt text, and links.
observations: The entire content is YAML frontmatter with no body text
The asset is an image/png stored at blob://b2:3ad97ebe245b3319ccfaaa5b8f6a1edd
Recorded width and height are both 0
There is exactly one version (v1) with an empty alt field
The source is listed as dragnet and the author session is ch-3mpkjg3r
created and updated timestamps are identical
standouts: Width and height are 0 for an image asset
Alt text is an empty string
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for a structured asset manifest
Follows ledger conventions with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, versions, and provenance fields
concerns: Zero width and height suggest missing or failed image metadata extraction
Empty alt text limits accessibility and searchability
No relationships or usage links are recorded
notes: A first-version, dragnet-sourced Gold video icon manifest that currently lacks usable dimensions and descriptive alt text.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What does the source value dragnet signify?
Is the empty alt text intentional or incomplete?
What visual or stylistic details define the Gold variant?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to catalog an image asset; it does catalog the asset, but the catalog is incomplete because dimensions and alt text are missing.
intention_signals: It appears to be registering a Gold-themed video icon into a shared design-assets ledger so it can be referenced by the image://design-assets/icons/Video_Gold address.
novelty: The Gold variant naming and channel-scoped image addressing are distinctive; otherwise the manifest is a conventional asset record.
contribution: It contributes a stable, addressable record and blob reference for a Video_Gold icon, plus provenance and versioning hooks that a fused system can retain once dimensions and alt text are reconciled.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a version-1 ledger manifest for a PNG image asset named Video_Gold in the design-assets channel, referencing blob b2:3ad97ebe245b3319ccfaaa5b8f6a1edd with zero recorded dimensions and empty alt text.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to register and make addressable a Gold-variant video icon for reuse across the design system.
